summary:
The Waterlase system utilizes an yttrium scandium gallium garnet (YSGG) laser operating at approximately 2780 nm due to its efficient absorption properties by water molecules. This makes option \(\boxed{D}\) accurate as per the provided context about effective dental procedures involving minimal tissue damage through precise targeting capabilities.
